title: Roche India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Roche India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Roche India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India Advisory Limited:
Roche India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India Advisory Limited!
